expectations.text: Asks Q0 about whether this is a UI/frontend project before any other intake question
expectations.evidence: Response contains 'Q0 — UI project check (asked first, on its own)' and ends with 'Is this a UI/frontend project... y / n'

expectations.text: Mentions or performs prereq verification (git, superpowers, context7)
expectations.evidence: Preflight check section lists git, superpowers (brainstorming, using-git-worktrees), context7 skill, context7 MCP server — all marked 'present'

expectations.text: Does NOT ask about known stacks, target stack version, idea, time budget in this turn
expectations.evidence: Explicitly defers: 'the rest of the intake questions — known stacks, target Rust version, idea sizing, time budget, scope red flags — come one at a time after this'

expectations.text: Does NOT create .learn/ or progress.json this turn
expectations.evidence: 'No `.learn/` directory detected — this is a new project.' No creation performed; state_updates.md confirms no writes this turn
